groups.description: Extend or wrap legacy draft storage idempotently, link draft headers to intake items, preserve draft/active separation, and prove the 60-minute capacity default remains in force.
testCommands: cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_lifecycle.py -k 'draft or migration or active_daily_tasks'
cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_integration.py -k 'daily_capacity_min'
cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_router.py -k 'start_endpoint or clarification_without_active_resources'

groups.description: Add storage entry points for assumptions, package shells, meaningful-edit draft versions, non-meaningful metadata updates, latest fetch, draft kind, and target plan linkage.
testCommands: cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_lifecycle.py -k 'version or package or assumptions or target_plan or draft_kind'
cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_intake_router.py -k 'handoff or scheduled_work or draft_phase'

groups.description: Implement guarded activation, activation events, stale-version and activation-ready checks, transaction rollback, existing-plan activation targets, duplicate activation safety, invalid transitions, and post-activation discard rejection.
testCommands: cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_lifecycle.py -k 'confirm or activation or stale or transaction or duplicate or discard or transition or target_plan'
cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_router.py -k 'confirm_endpoint or cancel_endpoint or stale'
cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_views_today.py

groups.description: Persist fallback-only task progress separately from full completion, keep follow-up visible, and run final backend regression for draft persistence compatibility.
testCommands: cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_lifecycle.py -k 'fallback'
cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_views_completion.py -k 'fallback or completion'
cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_lifecycle.py tests/test_study_plan_router.py tests/test_study_intake_router.py tests/test_study_views_today.py tests/test_integration.py
